name: XSL Script Processing for Code Execution
description: Detects use of msxsl.exe or wmic with XSL stylesheets for script execution
query:
// Detect XSL script processing via msxsl or wmic
// Trigger on XSL-based code execution
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(msxsl\.exe|wmic.*format.*:.*\.xsl|wmic.*\/format:)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
